title: Dragons SMP Modpack
body:
### Dragons SMP Modpack! ### My Twitch handle is https://www.twitch.tv/soitsdragon Come say hi and ask about the server! If you do wish to join please go into my twitch chat and type the command !discord to join the discord and navigate to the SMP channel to get the necessary information to join the server CURRENT FEATURES INCLUDE   We are rocking 1.20.1!  Shaders! [You need to add your own Shader]  Explore and find new biomes and land!  Tons of NEW Dungeons & Structures from The YUNGS Mods & Repurposed Structures  Xaero's World Map & Xaero's Minimap  Tons of QOL Feature   A Brand New Experience of Vanilla Minecraft Everything is auto synced to with the server for easy updates! Recommended Allocated RAM: 12GB Minimum Allocated RAM: 8GB How to Play: https://youtu.be/P3hd9MKWvXw ![Inventory HUD+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c8360cf6835efe3819d2a30f45e59d57b413fae.png)

Support

If you want to suggest anything, report a bug, or vote on future packs, then join my discord and you can message me in there. I will usually respond very quickly.

## [Check out my other mods here!](https://modrinth.com/user/soitsdragon)
